content.text:
Respond to the question:
Please share a time in the Piranha Plant Escape game when you felt you most needed your teammates' cooperation or communication. What happened?
回答問題：
請分享一次你在瑪利歐食人花遊戲中覺得最需要隊友配合或溝通的時刻，發生了什麼？
content.assessment_standard:
10	The moment I felt we most needed teamwork was when the dice roll required us to press the button multiple times. We had to communicate clearly about who would take the risk and how to distribute the presses. We quickly discussed our current positions and agreed that the player with the safest spot should take the extra presses to protect the team.|I realized teamwork was crucial when one of our players was very close to the Piranha Plant. We had to coordinate our moves to distract the plant or take risks ourselves to help them escape. By talking about our strategies and supporting each other, we managed to survive that tense round together.|There was a moment when we all panicked because the Piranha Plant was about to attack. We needed immediate communication to decide whether to advance quickly or stay put. I stepped up to calm everyone down, and we collectively decided to move forward cautiously, which saved us from losing.
9	The moment I felt we needed teamwork was when the dice required multiple presses. We had to communicate clearly about who would take the risk. We quickly discussed our positions and agreed the player with the safest spot should take the extra presses.|I realized teamwork was crucial when a player was close to the Piranha Plant. We had to coordinate moves to help them escape. By talking about strategies and supporting each other, we survived that tense round together.|There was a moment when we panicked because the plant was about to attack. We needed communication to decide whether to advance or stay put. I calmed everyone down, and we decided to move forward cautiously, saving us from losing.
8	The moment I feel we need teamwork is when dice need many press. We have to communicate who take the risk. We discuss position and agree the safe player take extra press to protect team.|I realize teamwork is important when player is close to Piranha Plant. We coordinate moves to help them escape. We talk strategy and support each other, we survive that round.|We panic because plant is about to attack. We need communication to decide advance or stay. I calm everyone and we decide move careful, it save us from lose.
7	I feel we need teamwork when dice need many press. We talk who take risk. We discuss and agree safe player press more to help team.|Teamwork is important when player near plant. We coordinate to help them escape. We talk and support, we survive the game.|We panic when plant attack. We need talk to decide move or stay. I tell everyone calm and we move careful. We not lose.
6	Need teamwork when dice need many press. Talk who take risk. Agree safe player press more help team.|Teamwork important when player near plant. Coordinate help escape. Talk and support, we survive.|Panic when plant attack. Need talk decide move or stay. Calm down move careful. Not lose.
5	Teamwork dice many press. Talk who risk. Safe player press help.|Teamwork player near plant. Help escape. Talk support survive.|Panic plant attack. Talk decide move. Calm careful not lose.
4	Teamwork many press. Talk risk. Help.|Teamwork near plant. Help escape. Survive.|Panic plant attack. Talk move. Calm.
3	Teamwork press. Talk risk.|Teamwork plant. Escape.|Panic attack. Calm.
2	Teamwork. Talk.|Teamwork. Escape.|Panic. Calm.
1	(No response / Silence)

content.text:
Respond to the question:
Please describe a past experience of teamwork where you needed to react or coordinate quickly. How did you cooperate with others?
回答問題：
請描述在曾經合作的經驗中，需要迅速反應或協調的情況時，你是如何與他人合作的？
content.assessment_standard:
10	Recently, my group and I were presenting a project when the computer suddenly crashed. We needed to react quickly to keep the audience engaged. I immediately started summarizing our main points verbally while my teammate worked on restarting the laptop. By dividing the tasks instantly without arguing, we handled the crisis smoothly.|During a basketball game, our opponent changed their defense strategy unexpectedly. We had to coordinate quickly on the court without calling a timeout. I used hand signals to communicate a new play to my teammates, and everyone adapted instantly. This quick coordination allowed us to score a crucial point.|I was volunteering at an event when it started raining heavily, and we had to move all the equipment indoors fast. I took charge by loudly assigning specific tasks to each volunteer, like carrying boxes or holding doors. Our rapid communication and teamwork prevented any equipment from getting damaged.
9	Recently, my group was presenting a project when the computer suddenly crashed. We needed to react quickly to keep the audience engaged. I summarized our main points verbally while my teammate restarted the laptop. By dividing tasks instantly, we handled the crisis smoothly.|During a basketball game, our opponent changed their defense unexpectedly. We had to coordinate quickly on the court. I used hand signals to communicate a new play, and everyone adapted instantly. This quick coordination allowed us to score.|I was volunteering when it started raining heavily, and we had to move equipment indoors fast. I took charge by assigning specific tasks to each volunteer. Our rapid communication and teamwork prevented equipment from getting damaged.
8	My group is presenting a project when computer crash. We need to react quickly for audience. I summarize main points while my teammate restart laptop. We divide tasks fast and handle crisis smoothly.|In basketball game, opponent change defense fast. We have to coordinate quickly on court. I use hand signal to communicate new play to teammates. Everyone adapt and we score point.|I volunteer at event when it rain heavy. We move equipment indoor fast. I assign task to each volunteer like carry box. Our fast teamwork prevent equipment damage.
7	My group present project and computer crash. We need react quick. I talk main point and teammate fix computer. We divide task fast and handle crisis good.|In basketball, opponent change defense. We coordinate quick on court. I use hand signal to teammates. Everyone understand and we score.|I volunteer when rain heavy. We move equipment indoor quick. I give task to volunteers to carry box. Fast teamwork keep equipment safe.
6	Group present computer crash. Need react quick. I talk main point teammate fix computer. Divide task handle crisis good.|Basketball opponent change defense. Coordinate quick. Use hand signal to teammate. Everyone understand score.|Volunteer rain heavy. Move equipment indoor quick. Give task volunteer carry box. Fast teamwork keep safe.
5	Group present crash. React quick. Talk point fix computer. Divide task good.|Basketball change defense. Coordinate quick. Hand signal teammate. Understand score.|Volunteer rain. Move equipment quick. Give task carry box. Fast teamwork safe.
4	Group crash. React quick. Fix.|Basketball defense. Coordinate quick. Signal.|Volunteer rain. Move quick. Task.
3	Crash. React quick.|Defense. Quick.|Rain. Quick.
2	React. Quick.|Coordinate.|Quick.
1	(No response / Silence)

content.text:
Respond to the question:
In teamwork situations, which part do you feel you need to improve the most? Why?
回答問題：
在團隊合作的情境中，你覺得自己最需要改進的是哪一部分？為什麼？
content.assessment_standard:
10	In teamwork situations, I feel I need to improve my active listening skills the most. Sometimes I get too eager to share my own ideas and end up interrupting others. If I listen more carefully, I can better understand my teammates' strengths and build upon their suggestions, creating a more cooperative environment.|I need to work on expressing my opinions more confidently during group work. I often hesitate to speak up when I disagree with a majority decision, which sometimes leads to poor outcomes for the team. Learning to communicate my thoughts clearly and respectfully will make me a more valuable team member.|My ability to delegate tasks needs improvement. I usually try to do too much by myself because I worry others might not do it perfectly. This causes me unnecessary stress and prevents others from contributing. Trusting my teammates and sharing the workload would greatly improve our efficiency.
9	In teamwork situations, I feel I need to improve my active listening skills the most. I get too eager to share my ideas and interrupt others. If I listen carefully, I can understand my teammates' strengths and build upon their suggestions, creating a cooperative environment.|I need to work on expressing my opinions confidently during group work. I hesitate to speak up when I disagree with a majority decision, leading to poor outcomes. Learning to communicate my thoughts respectfully will make me a valuable member.|My ability to delegate tasks needs improvement. I try to do too much by myself because I worry others might not do it perfectly. Trusting my teammates and sharing the workload would improve our efficiency.
8	In teamwork, I feel I need to improve listening skills most. I am eager to share ideas and interrupt others. If I listen careful, I can understand teammates and build on their suggestion. It make cooperative environment.|I need to improve expressing opinions confident in group work. I hesitate to speak when I disagree, which lead to bad outcome. Learning to communicate my thoughts clear will make me valuable.|I need improve delegate tasks. I try to do too much by myself because I worry others not perfect. Trust teammates and share work will improve efficiency.
7	In teamwork, I need improve listening skill. I want share idea and interrupt other. If I listen careful, I understand teammate better and make good environment.|I should improve express opinion confident. I don't speak when I disagree, it make bad outcome. Learn communicate clear make me good member.|I need improve share tasks. I do too much myself because I worry. Trust teammate and share work make us fast.
6	Teamwork need improve listening. Share idea interrupt other. Listen careful understand teammate make good environment.|Improve express opinion confident. Don't speak when disagree make bad outcome. Learn communicate clear good member.|Need improve share task. Do too much myself worry. Trust teammate share work fast.
5	Improve listening. Share idea interrupt. Listen careful understand teammate.|Improve express opinion. Not speak disagree bad. Learn communicate clear.|Improve share task. Do much myself worry. Trust teammate share.
4	Improve listen. Interrupt. Understand.|Improve express. Disagree. Communicate.|Improve share. Do myself. Trust.
3	Listen. Interrupt.|Express. Disagree.|Share. Trust.
2	Listen.|Express.|Share.
1	(No response / Silence)

content.text:
Respond to the question:
How did you handle the sudden surprise or fear when the Piranha Plant attacked during the Piranha Plant Escape game?
回答問題：
在瑪利歐食人花遊戲中當食人花突然攻擊時，你如何處理那種突然的驚嚇或恐懼？
content.assessment_standard:
10	When the Piranha Plant suddenly attacked, I was genuinely startled and literally jumped in my seat. My heart was pounding rapidly from the sudden surprise. To manage my fear, I took a deep breath and laughed out loud with my friends. Acknowledging the jump scare as part of the game's fun helped me quickly calm down.|The sudden attack of the Piranha Plant completely caught me off guard, and I felt a rush of adrenaline. I briefly felt upset because it meant I lost progress, but I quickly reminded myself it was just a mechanism based on luck. I took a sip of water and refocused on planning my next move.|I felt a sudden spike of anxiety when the plant lunged forward. It was terrifying for a second! To deal with the shock, I clapped my hands and congratulated the player who triggered it for their 'great' luck. Turning the scary moment into a shared joke completely erased my nervousness.
9	When the Piranha Plant suddenly attacked, I was startled and jumped in my seat. My heart was pounding from the surprise. To manage my fear, I took a deep breath and laughed with my friends. Acknowledging the jump scare as fun helped me calm down.|The sudden attack caught me off guard, and I felt a rush of adrenaline. I briefly felt upset because I lost progress, but reminded myself it was just luck. I took a sip of water and refocused on my next move.|I felt a sudden spike of anxiety when the plant lunged forward. To deal with the shock, I clapped my hands and congratulated the player for their luck. Turning the scary moment into a joke erased my nervousness.
8	When Piranha Plant suddenly attack, I am startled and jump in seat. My heart pound from surprise. To manage fear, I take deep breath and laugh with friends. Think it is fun help me calm down.|The sudden attack catch me off guard and I feel adrenaline. I feel upset because I lose progress, but I tell myself it is luck. I drink water and focus on next move.|I feel anxiety when plant attack forward. To deal with shock, I clap hands and congratulate the player for luck. Turn scary moment to joke remove my nervous.
7	When plant sudden attack, I am startle and jump. Heart beat fast from surprise. I take breath and laugh with friend to manage fear. It is fun and I calm down.|Sudden attack make me surprise. I feel upset I lose, but I tell myself it is game luck. I drink water and focus next play.|I feel nervous when plant attack. I clap hand and joke with player for luck. Make scary to funny remove my nervous.
6	Plant sudden attack I startle jump. Heart beat fast. Take breath laugh with friend manage fear. Fun calm down.|Sudden attack surprise. Upset lose but tell myself game luck. Drink water focus play.|Nervous plant attack. Clap hand joke player luck. Make scary funny remove nervous.
5	Plant attack startle jump. Heart fast. Breath laugh friend manage fear.|Attack surprise. Upset lose tell game luck. Water focus.|Nervous attack. Clap hand joke luck. Scary funny.
4	Attack jump. Heart fast. Laugh.|Surprise. Upset lose. Focus.|Nervous. Joke. Funny.
3	Attack jump. Laugh.|Surprise upset.|Nervous joke.
2	Jump. Laugh.|Surprise.|Nervous.
1	(No response / Silence)

content.text:
Respond to the question:
Did you experience any disagreements with your teammates regarding the dice roll or strategy in the Piranha Plant Escape game? How did you resolve them?
回答問題：
你在瑪利歐食人花遊戲中和隊友在擲骰子或策略上有發生過意見不合嗎？你們是如何解決的？
content.assessment_standard:
10	During the game, my teammate and I disagreed on whether to advance aggressively or stay back. I wanted to move forward, but they felt it was too risky. We resolved it by quickly discussing the odds of the plant attacking on the next turn. We reached a compromise to advance only one space, satisfying both our need for progress and safety.|We had a disagreement when deciding who should press the button. Everyone was scared and refused to do it. Instead of arguing, I suggested we use a quick game of rock-paper-scissors to decide fairly. This completely stopped the argument and brought a fun, objective solution to our dispute.|My teammate insisted on a strategy that I thought was guaranteed to fail. I felt frustrated but decided to listen to their reasoning first. After they explained, I politely pointed out a flaw in their plan and suggested an alternative. By keeping the communication respectful, we agreed on a better combined strategy.
9	During the game, my teammate and I disagreed on whether to advance aggressively or stay back. I wanted to move forward, but they felt it was risky. We resolved it by discussing the odds of the plant attacking. We compromised to advance one space, satisfying our need for progress and safety.|We had a disagreement when deciding who should press the button. Everyone was scared and refused. Instead of arguing, I suggested rock-paper-scissors to decide fairly. This stopped the argument and brought a fun solution to our dispute.|My teammate insisted on a strategy I thought would fail. I felt frustrated but listened to their reasoning first. After they explained, I pointed out a flaw and suggested an alternative. By communicating respectfully, we agreed on a combined strategy.
8	My teammate and I disagree on whether to advance or stay back. I want move forward, but they feel risky. We resolve it by discuss the odds of plant attack. We compromise to advance one space for progress and safety.|We have disagreement who should press button. Everyone scared and refuse. Instead of argue, I suggest rock-paper-scissors to decide. This stop argument and bring fun solution to dispute.|My teammate want a strategy I think will fail. I feel frustrate but listen to their reason. After they explain, I point out flaw and suggest alternative. We talk respectfully and agree on good strategy.
7	Teammate and I disagree to advance or stay. I want go, they feel risk. We talk about plant attack chance. We agree advance one space for safe and progress.|We disagree who press button. Everyone scare and say no. I suggest play rock-paper-scissors. It stop argue and make fun solution.|Teammate want bad strategy. I listen to him first. Then I tell him problem and give new idea. We talk nice and agree new strategy.
6	Disagree advance or stay. Want go they feel risk. Talk plant attack chance. Agree advance one space for safe.|Disagree who press button. Everyone scare. Suggest play rock-paper-scissors. Stop argue fun solution.|Teammate want bad strategy. Listen first. Tell problem give new idea. Talk nice agree new.
5	Disagree advance stay. Talk plant attack. Agree advance one space safe.|Disagree press button. Scare. Play rock-paper-scissors stop argue.|Bad strategy. Listen tell problem. Talk nice agree.
4	Disagree advance. Talk. Agree safe.|Disagree press. Rock-paper-scissors. Stop.|Bad strategy. Listen. Agree.
3	Disagree advance. Safe.|Disagree. Game.|Strategy. Listen.
2	Disagree. Safe.|Disagree.|Strategy.
1	(No response / Silence)
